connectors.name: X1 - Crystal
connectors.description: Connect this pin to a 32kHz watch crystal

connectors.name: X2 - Crystal
connectors.description: Connect this pin to a 32kHz watch crystal

connectors.name: Vbat - Backup Supply
connectors.description: Connect this pin to the positive connection of a 3V battery or connect to 0V (ground) to operate the device without a backup battery supply

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: SDA - I2C Data
connectors.description: Connect this pin to the 'I2C Data' (SDA) signal of the controller

connectors.name: SCL - I2C Clock
connectors.description: Connect this pin to the 'I2C Clock' (SCL) signal of the controller

connectors.name: SWQ/OUT - Clock Output
connectors.description: This pin is an open-collector output which can generate a square wave signal when the clock is running. To use this output with a digital input a pull-up resistor to the postive rail of the power supply must be fitted

connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit
